Initial commit with task details

Adding .gitkeep for PR creation (default mode).
This file will be removed when the task is complete.

Issue: https://github.com/ideav/crm/issues/2746

fix(integram-table): delete referencing requisite before deleting the table (closes #2746)

When deleting a table whose metadata exposes a "referenced" id, the
server refuses to delete it until the referencing requisite is removed.
deleteTable() now fetches fresh metadata, calls _d_del/{referenced} for
each referencing requisite, then deletes the table itself. Loops while
the server still reports references (with a `seen` set and a 32-step
cap to guard against runaway loops).

Also surfaces the full server error on every failure path (issue text:
"Не забывай вывести сообщение об ошибке целиком!") and uses the raw
response body instead of "Неизвестная ошибка" when the JSON payload is
unexpected.
